title: Oarfish Simulated Dataset --- ONT dataset obtained from NA12878 cell line
author: Zare Joushegani, Zahra
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This repository contains ONT-simulated datasets generated from the NA12878 cell line using the NanoSim simulator for both 1D cDNA and direct RNA protocols.
steps_raw: This repository contains ONT-simulated datasets generated from the NA12878 cell line using the NanoSim simulator for both 1D cDNA and direct RNA protocols.
